contact.faxDesc: For physician offices and care providers

hours.afterHoursMsg: Outside of business hours: Please leave a message and our Detroit pharmacy team will return your call first thing next business morning.

hero.heading: Detroit's 4.9★ independent pharmacy — free same-day prescription delivery.
hero.description: Fenkell Rx Pharmacy proudly serves Detroit's community. We're independently owned, deeply personal, and genuinely committed to your wellbeing — not just filling prescriptions.

services.sectionDesc: From fast prescription refills to custom compounding, our licensed Detroit pharmacists provide expert medical care tailored to your family.
services.card1Desc: Fast, accurate filling of your prescription medications. Same-day dispensing on most local orders with expert pharmacist verification.
services.card2Desc: 100% free prescription delivery to your home across Northwest Detroit, Rosedale Park, Brightmoor, and Grandmont—with same-day delivery available.
services.card3Desc: Comprehensive review of your medications by our Detroit pharmacists to identify interactions, improve adherence, and optimize health outcomes.
services.card4Desc: Pre-sorted daily dose packaging for patients managing multiple medications. Perfect, local alternative to corporate mail-order systems for seniors.
services.card5Desc: Align all your monthly prescription refills to a single pickup or free delivery date so you never run out unexpectedly.
services.card6Desc: Custom compounded medications prepared to your doctor's exact specifications—dosages, strengths, and flavors tailored specifically for you or your pets.

immunizations.sectionDesc: Our certified immunizing pharmacists require no appointments for routine vaccinations. Stop by today for immediate, local care.
immunizations.insuranceNote: Insurance Accepted: Most vaccines are covered at $0 copay with Medicare Part B, Part D, Medicaid, or private insurance plans. We verify your coverage instantly.
immunizations.card1Desc: Annual · All ages · Walk-in Flu Shots
immunizations.card8Desc: Typhoid, Hep A, Yellow Fever + more

team.sectionTitle: Detroit Pharmacists Who Know Your Name
team.sectionDesc: Our skilled local pharmacy team is committed to more than just filling prescriptions—we take the time to deliver attentive, expert care to our Detroit neighbors.
team.member1Bio: Passionate about Detroit community health with 13+ years in patient care, local pharmacy operations, and clinical leadership. Specializes in medication synchronization, immunizations, and accessible care.
team.member2Bio: Dedicated to providing safe, accurate, and compassionate independent pharmacy care to every patient in our local community.
team.member3Bio: Delivers medications directly to homes across Detroit and leads our pharmacy community outreach efforts to keep patients safely connected to care.

reviews.sectionDesc: Read real feedback from neighbors who switched from big corporate pharmacy chains to Fenkell Rx Pharmacy.
reviews.r1text: “This place is literally the best! I was honestly freaking out because I thought my meds were gonna cost a fortune, but they didn’t at all! The pharmacist is very kind, and he even came from behind the counter and explained to me exactly how to use my meds. I seriously recommend this place!”
reviews.r2text: “I luv this pharmacy! The pharmacist and staff are amazing! He was the best pharmacist at Rite Aid and I’m so happy he has his own! Kudos!”
reviews.r3text: “The staff is very nice. The pharmacist goes above and beyond to be sure that each and every customer has been taken care of. They also deliver!!! One of the best pharmacies by far! CVS who?? No wait and they always have the medication you need!”
reviews.r4text: “The most caring, kind and compassionate pharmacy I have ever dealt with. I have done surgery for 32 years, and I have never been more impressed with the excellence and professionalism they provide. In health care many lose the true purpose we have, to serve! I am so blessed to have found this pharmacy. If I could give 10 stars!!!!”
reviews.r5text: “I just switched from another pharmacy to Fenkell RX. Syed, the pharmacist goes above and beyond to make sure I have the medications I need that are essential to my well being in a timely manner. He is a professional with a personal touch that will make a great addition to our community.”
reviews.r6text: “Pharmacist Hassan took the time to help a customer who needed a prescription for a brand name drug insurance would not pay — the cost was $400. Other pharmacies were not helpful at all. I am grateful this pharmacy is open. Phenomenal service, thank you!”

insurance.sectionTitle: We Accept Medicaid, Medicare & Major Insurance
insurance.sectionDesc: Our independent pharmacy works seamlessly with your provider networks and matches or beats big box coupon pricing like GoodRx.
insurance.calloutText: Don't see your plan listed? Call (313) 519-5700 — we likely accept it, or we'll help find your lowest local prescription cash price.
insurance.plan3: Blue Cross Blue Shield of MI
insurance.feature1Desc: We verify your copays and medical benefits beforehand so there are no surprise costs at our pickup counter or delivery.
insurance.feature2Desc: We connect eligible local patients with manufacturer assistance programs to secure high-cost brand medications for free or low cost.
insurance.feature3Desc: We accept cash, major credit cards, FSA/HSA cards, and structural monthly billing layouts for established local care patients.
insurance.feature4Desc: We actively suggest FDA-approved generic equivalents to drastically cut your monthly out-of-pocket costs compared to big chains.

refills.sectionTitle: Skip CVS, Walgreens, Walmart & Meijer Lines. Refill Online.
refills.sectionDesc: Submit your prescription refills online. Choose convenient walk-in pickup or our free prescription home delivery service.
refills.step1Desc: Located directly on your Fenkell Rx bottle label
refills.step2Desc: Verify date of birth and select free home delivery or in-store pickup
refills.step3Desc: We will immediately text or email you when your order is ready
refills.formSubtitle: You will receive an instant alert when your medication is ready.

screenings.sectionDesc: No appointment needed. Walk-in and receive free screenings with a licensed independent pharmacist regarding your clinical results.
screenings.ctaTitle: Wellness Support for the Detroit Community
screenings.ctaBtn: Call to Schedule a Health Consultation
screenings.ctaDesc: We partner with local Detroit physicians and regional clinics to provide community wellness support and chronic disease management.
screenings.perk4: Direct coordination with your care team

transfer.heading: Tired of Big Chain Pharmacy Wait Times?
transfer.description: Transferring prescriptions to Fenkell Rx Pharmacy is fast, free, and simple. Fill out our online transfer form below—our team will contact your old CVS, Walgreens, Walmart, Meijer or any other pharmacy and manage everything for you.
transfer.privacyNote: Your medical information is strictly private, HIPAA compliant, and used only to securely process your prescription transfer.

contact_form.sectionTitle: Have an Rx Question? Our Pharmacists Are Here.
contact_form.sectionDesc: Ask our clinical staff about specific medications, stock availability, insurance plans, or our free delivery services.
contact_form.formTitle: Send a Message to Our Pharmacists
contact_form.formSubtitle: We respond directly within 1 business day.

footer.brandDesc: Independently owned local pharmacy. Proudly serving Northwest Detroit, North Rosedale Park, Rosedale Park, Grandmont, Grandmont #1, Minock Park, Old Redford, Brightmoor, Castle Rouge, Schoolcraft, Southfield Plymouth, Eliza Howell, Greenfield-Grand River, Redford Township, and Southfield with professional, personalized pharmaceutical care.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Fenkell Rx Pharmacy. All rights reserved. Licensed by the Michigan Board of Pharmacy. 18360 Fenkell Ave, Detroit, MI 48223.

availability_page.heroDesc: Experiencing shortages or long delays at CVS, Walgreens, Walmart, or Meijer? Check our local stock below—we specialize in sourcing hard-to-find medications for our Detroit neighborhood patients.
availability_page.ctaHeading: Medication not showing in our inventory?
availability_page.ctaDesc: Call us or message our team directly—we source medications daily through alternative networks and can rapidly secure what you need.
availability_page.footerHoursLine: Mon–Fri 9:30 AM–6:00 PM · Sat 9:30 AM–3:00 PM · Detroit, MI

overlay.heading: Medication Stock
overlay.subtext: Can't find your critical medication at big box pharmacy retailers? We are an independent Detroit pharmacy tracking and stocking hard-to-find medications. Search our local live inventory below.
